steps.t: The Ranger Himeinior stands to the west of the entrance of Tornhad.
The Ranger Himeinior gave you a bag of rations to distribute throughout the encampment, asking you to fill up the provision crates found throughout To…
Ravaedron is speaking with the Rangers within the bounds of Tornhad.
Ranger Idhrenfair has caught your eye; he surely has a task of some kind for you to complete.
The Ranger Idhrenfair gave you a number of swords that are in need of repair, and instructed you to leave them in a barrel near the forge for that pur…
The Ranger Prestadír has a number of questions for you, and likely a task for you to perform as well.
The Ranger Prestadír has asked you to conduct a patrol of the outskirts of Tornhad while he finishes up his work at the forge and speaks with Ravaedro…
Ravaedron is in Tornhad, speaking with a number of the Rangers who dwell there.
